/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/Drift.dir/src/GameObjects/Balloon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Drift.dir/src/GameObjects/PhysicsObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Drift.dir/src/GameStates/HomeState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Drift.dir/src/GameStates/PlayingState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Drift.dir/src/StateManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Drift.dir/src/UI/Button.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Drift.dir/src/UI/Container.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Drift.dir/src/UI/Label.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Drift.dir/src/UI/UIElement.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Drift.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o Drift  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
